result:
Report written to `/home/nate/charos/haros-events/housekeeping/disk-audit-report.md`.

**Headline:** No disk pressure on either Linux root (tc-nest 36%, jarvis-wsl 39%). Largest consumers are journald (1.9G jarvis, 1.1G nest) — oversized but not threatening. Jarvis `/var/log/auth.log` is unusually fat at ~91M across active+rotated; worth investigating *what* is chattering before tuning rotation. Windows D: at 99% is real pressure but out of scope. Risk: **LOW**. Total cleanup effort if pursued: <30 min, no urgency.

Note: `~/family-brain` doesn't exist on either machine, and `~/charos` doesn't exist on jarvis — flagged in the report.
